changeSet.author: dev

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email ~ '^user[0-9]+@test\.com$'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, created_at, updated_at) SELECT 'user' || n || '@test.com', '$2a$10$dXJ3SUicVNrDY2Z8VHMh.eC2xVRMLNWFvD0jGDbNMqfHVNmXy1h0a', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM generate_series(1, 1000) AS n ON CONFLICT (email) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: dev

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seats WHERE seat_number ~ '^A[0-9]{3,4}$'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO seats (seat_number, status, created_at, updated_at) SELECT 'A' || LPAD(n::text, 3, '0'), 'AVAILABLE', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM generate_series(1, 1000) AS n ON CONFLICT (seat_number) DO NOTHING;
